channel.title: Analysis: CSS in JS is the Future
channel.description:
https://diigo.com/0i60p4
**Advantages of using CSS in JS:**
- Isolated styles - All the power of JS to create variables, functions, make imports - optimize the size of our CSS and make “lazy load” - share CSS through NPM - write code once and transform it into solutions for web, mobile or even sketch

item.title: Analysis: CSS in JS is the Future
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
diigo.com

WARNING: CSS in JS is the Future. Let’s overcome the limitations of CSS… | by...

Advantages of using CSS in JS:

  • Isolated styles
  • All the power of JS to create variables, functions, make imports
  • optimize the size of our CSS and make “lazy load”
  • share CSS through NPM
  • write code once and transform it into solutions for web, mobile or even sketch

Read full topic
item.source: Analysis: CSS in JS is the Future
